title: Speeder (disambiguation)
content:
'''[[Speeder/Legends|Speeder]]''' could refer to:
*Any [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsorlift]] vehicle designed for planetary operations. They are normally divided into two classes, based on their operating altitude.
**[[Landspeeder/Legends|Landspeeders]] are designed to operate close to a planet's surface, no higher than a few meters
**[[Airspeeder/Legends|Airspeeders]] have more powerful repulsorlifts and are able to operate at much higher altitudes, anywhere from hundreds of meters to low-orbital altitudes.
*[[Speeder (fan film)|''Speeder'']] – a [[fan film]] from the 2005 [[The Official Star Wars Fan Film Awards|Official ''Star Wars'' Fan Film Awards]]

{{Disambig}}
